label: three_stage/OrderSystem/trial_02/repeat_02
governance_notes: Parent global_vars orders, inventory, payments are all read_write. ParseCommand, ValidateOrderData, and FormatResult are pure functions with no data store access. PlaceOrder and CancelOrder each cover read_write on all three stores. TrackOrder covers read on orders only. The union of child global_vars covers all parent required operations: orders read_write (PlaceOrder, CancelOrder, TrackOrder), inventory read_write (PlaceOrder, CancelOrder), payments read_write (PlaceOrder, CancelOrder). No par
